value.found_quote: Subagents are an excellent way to parallelize complex tasks and preserve the context of your main agent. Instead of executing every step serially, an agent can delegate tasks—such as running tests or performing extensive codebase searches—to dedicated subagents.
value.rationale: The page extensively describes Antigravity's subagents capability, including invoking, monitoring, cancelling, defining custom subagents, and managing their lifecycle (running, idle, killed). This substantiates the claim that Google offers managing subagents. The core subagents feature is presented as available, though the related multi-agent teamwork command is noted as in preview.
